note: classic statement: balance and minimum payment are both true amounts, one due date, no explicit verb

message.subject: Your June statement is ready
message.body_text: Your June statement is ready. Statement balance: $1,243.87. Minimum payment due: $35.00. Payment due date: 07/02/2026.

note: past due notice with assessed late fee and escalation deadline

message.subject: Your account is past due
message.body_text: Your account is past due. Amount past due: $87.00. A late fee of $29 has been assessed. Pay at least the minimum by June 26, 2026 to avoid an additional penalty fee. Call 555-0177 to discuss payment options.

message.subject: Annual fee reminder
message.body_text: A reminder that your card's $95 annual fee will post to your account on 07/10/2026. If you would like to discuss product options, call the number on the back of your card.

note: fraud alert: suspicious charge amount is user-relevant, past transaction date is not a deadline

message.subject: Did you make this purchase?
message.body_text: We noticed a charge of $310.45 at an electronics retailer on June 14, 2026 that may not match your usual activity. Review this transaction in the app and confirm whether you recognize it. If not, call us immediately at 555-0145.

note: APR change with ISO effective date; percentages are not dollar amounts

message.subject: Notice of variable APR change
message.body_text: Notice of variable APR change: effective 2026-08-01, your purchase APR will change from 21.24% to 22.49% based on the prime rate. No action is required. Your minimum payment calculation does not change.

note: autopay withdrawal: upcoming draft date and amount are real obligations

message.subject: Autopay scheduled
message.body_text: Autopay scheduled: your statement balance of $612.40 will be withdrawn from your checking account ending 4421 on 06/28/2026. Ensure sufficient funds to avoid a returned payment fee.

note: credit limit increase: new limit is not an obligation amount (FP trap)

message.subject: Your credit limit has increased
message.body_text: Congratulations! Your credit limit has been increased to $12,000 effective immediately. No action is needed. Sign in to view your updated account terms.

note: rewards expiration: real deadline, redeem is outside the action lexicon

message.subject: Your points are expiring
message.body_text: Your 5,400 rewards points are set to expire on July 31, 2026. Redeem them for statement credit or gift cards before they lapse.

note: payment receipt: completed payment amount near pay risk word is a high-confidence FP trap

message.subject: Payment received
message.body_text: We received your payment of $200.00 on June 18, 2026. Thank you for your payment. You can view your receipt in the app.

note: balance transfer marketing: promo deadline and $0 fee are marketing content (FP traps)

message.subject: 0% intro APR on balance transfers
message.body_text: Limited time: transfer a balance and enjoy 0% intro APR until your October 2026 statement, with a $0 balance transfer fee on transfers made before July 20, 2026. See offer terms.

note: low balance alert: threshold near balance risk word is a high-confidence FP trap; review is a real action

message.subject: Low balance alert
message.body_text: Low balance alert: your checking account balance has fallen below $25. Review your recent transactions and transfer funds if needed to avoid overdraft fees.

note: CD maturity: fixed date plus relative grace period; schedule and renew appear

message.subject: Your CD is maturing
message.body_text: Your 12-month certificate of deposit ending 7731 matures on 08/15/2026. It will automatically renew at the current rate unless you make changes during the 10-day grace period. To discuss options, schedule an appointment with a banker.

note: fee change with ISO date, informational

message.subject: Foreign transaction fee update
message.body_text: Effective 2026-09-15, the foreign transaction fee on your card will change from 3% to 0%. This change applies automatically to qualifying purchases.

note: billing-error rights: relative 60-day window, dispute outside lexicon, submit and send are explicit

message.subject: How to dispute a charge
message.body_text: If you wish to dispute a charge on your June statement, you must submit a written billing-error notice within 60 days of the statement date. Send your notice to the address listed on your statement.
